title: vernonia anthelmintica
intro: Vernonia anthelmintica, also known as kutki or bhunimba, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, native to the Himalayan region and parts of India. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly as an antihelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and hepatoprotective agent, which helps in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Vernonia anthelmintica include reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems and fever. Vernonia anthelmintica is traditionally used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties, and is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
